history_text: 42-year-old male with a 11-year history of Type 2 diabetes mellitus, currently well-controlled (HbA1c 7.1%). Comorbidities include obstructive sleep apnoea, hyperlipidaemia, T2DM with hyperglycaemia. Renal function is mildly to moderately reduced (eGFR 49.6 mL/min/1.73m²). Current medications include Metformin 500mg twice daily, Omeprazole 20mg once daily, Lisinopril 10mg once daily. No known drug allergies. He denies recent hospitalisations or surgical procedures.
